data.cta_english: Is Lamine Yamal the best winger? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: A young kid from a humble neighborhood chased a giant dream, because he wanted to play on the biggest stages.
segments.image_query: poor kid playing football on a dusty street at sunset
segments.subtitle_english: A young kid from a humble neighborhood chased a giant dream, because he wanted to play on the biggest stages.
segments.voice_hindi: एक साधारण पड़ोस का एक युवा बच्चा एक विशाल सपने का पीछा कर रहा था, क्योंकि वह सबसे बड़े मंचों पर खेलना चाहता था।

segments.voice_english: He spent countless hours training alone on concrete pitches, but people doubted if a skinny kid could ever survive professional football.
segments.image_query: young skinny boy training alone on a concrete football pitch under a hot sun
segments.subtitle_english: He spent countless hours training alone on concrete pitches, but people doubted if a skinny kid could ever survive professional football.
segments.voice_hindi: उन्होंने कंक्रीट की पिचों पर अकेले प्रशिक्षण में अनगिनत घंटे बिताए, लेकिन लोगों को संदेह था कि क्या एक पतला बच्चा कभी पेशेवर फुटबॉल में टिक पाएगा।

segments.voice_english: Barcelona signed the young winger to their senior squad, because they knew he possessed a truly special, generational talent.
segments.subtitle_english: Barcelona signed the young winger to their senior squad, because they knew he possessed a truly special, generational talent.
segments.voice_hindi: बार्सिलोना ने युवा विंगर को अपनी सीनियर टीम में शामिल किया, क्योंकि वे जानते थे कि उसके पास वास्तव में विशेष, पीढ़ीगत प्रतिभा है।

segments.voice_english: His incredible performance earned him a starting spot with Spain, so he now dominates matches on the big international stage.
segments.image_query: Lamine Yamal Spain national football team
segments.subtitle_english: His incredible performance earned him a starting spot with Spain, so he now dominates matches on the big international stage.
segments.voice_hindi: उनके अविश्वसनीय प्रदर्शन ने उन्हें स्पेन के साथ शुरुआती स्थान दिलाया, इसलिए अब वह बड़े अंतरराष्ट्रीय मंच पर मैचों पर हावी हैं।

segments.voice_english: This Spanish winger rose from humble beginnings to the absolute top, and he is now regarded as one of the best.
segments.subtitle_english: This Spanish winger rose from humble beginnings to the absolute top, and he is now regarded as one of the best.
segments.voice_hindi: यह स्पैनिश विंगर साधारण शुरुआत से पूर्ण शिखर तक पहुंचा और अब उसे सर्वश्रेष्ठ में से एक माना जाता है।

data.youtube_title: Lamine Yamal: Concrete Pitch Se Barca Star Tak 🚀
title_options: Lamine Yamal: Concrete Pitch Se Barca Star Tak 🚀
Lamine Yamal ka Secret Struggle Jo Kisi Ko Nahi Pata 🤫
data.description: Ek patla sa ladka concrete pitches par khelta tha, aur aaj wo Barcelona ka sabse bada star hai! 🥺 Lamine Yamal ki ye emotional journey aapko sach me inspire kar degi. Kya Lamine Yamal future me Ballon d'Or jeet payega? Comment me batao! 👇
